experience.name: YaVendio

Created custom Claude AI skills and agents using Cursor and Claude Code, redesigned the onboarding flow improving activation by 85%, and implemented backend microservices in Python with AWS Lambda.

experience.name: Aimo

Built microservices and APIs handling real-time order processing for 200+ locations, leveraging Windsurf AI-assisted development.
